guidance: Use a credible external study to explain why a capability matters. Qualified language: 'Research suggests...', 'The study found...'.
evidence_note: Attribute the source. NEVER imply Black Arrow produced the result or achieves the same without evidence.
reason: Exploration (8% budget): sampling 'Third-Party Research / Market Evidence' to keep learning what performs, not just exploiting the current leader.
post_rationale: Carousels still lead saves/depth for B2B educational content in 2026, and this reframes the account's core speed-to-lead fact around a fresh, precisely-sourced 2026 study, teaching median-vs-best-case measurement instead of restating the familiar 17%/double-close-rate line.

guidance: Feature ONE specific free tool actually published at blackarrow.ltd/tools (a calculator, an audit, an AI builder, or Black Arrow OS — the free pocket CRM). Everything on that page is free value used as a lead magnet. Lead with what the tool tells or gives the owner, cite its stated value where the site shows one, and end with the TOOLS keyword CTA. Rotate through the tools; never feature the same one twice in a row.
evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Offers / Lead Magnets' was the most under-served eligible category (target 22%, recent 11%).
post_rationale: Carousels are currently the format that wins saves, depth, and conversion for B2B offer content, and this is the first solo feature of the Lead Response Audit, filling the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot with an unclaimed tool.

guidance: Promote the Black Arrow platform (blackarrow.ltd/app) through its real offers: the 14-day full-access free trial (no card needed, cancel anytime) and the referral deal (refer a business, when they subscribe you both get a free month, tracked automatically). Angle it around a real pain the platform kills (tool sprawl, missed calls, slow follow-up, no revenue reporting). Lead with value, end with the TRIAL keyword CTA. Never invent features or plan pricing; point plan questions to the site.
evidence_note: Only features and offers actually published on blackarrow.ltd/app. No invented pricing or results.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Platform / Free Trial Promo' was the most under-served eligible category (target 12%, recent 4%).
post_rationale: Cut the referral tangent to keep one clean idea: revenue attribution. Keyword now appears exactly once, in the caption CTA, while the video end card teases the payoff without repeating it. Tightened language removes filler adverbs and aligns the video's spreadsheet line with the caption for consistency.
